import torch
ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/ensemble.pt', map_location='cpu')
for k in ['m1','m2','m3']:
    if k not in ckpt:
        continue
    new_state = {}
    for key, val in ckpt[k]['model'].items():
        new_key = key.replace('_orig_mod.', '')
        new_state[new_key] = val
    ckpt[k]['model'] = new_state
torch.save(ckpt, 'checkpoints/ensemble_fixed.pt')
# Also save best single model as fallback
torch.save(ckpt['m1'], 'checkpoints/best.pt')
print('Saved ensemble_fixed.pt and best.pt')
